response:
the force with which the airstream acts on a sail can be calculated using the formula:  
f = (b s rho (v0 - v)^2) / 2  
s = 7 m²  
v0 = 6.3 m/s  
v = ?  

at a certain moment, the instantaneous wind power reaches its maximum value.  
this occurs when the derivative of the force with respect to velocity is zero.  
the derivative of f with respect to v is:  
df/dv = (b s rho (2(v0 - v)) / 2) = b s rho (v0 - v)  

setting df/dv = 0:  
b s rho (v0 - v) = 0  

since b, s, and rho are constants, this implies:  
v0 - v = 0  

thus, the speed of the sailboat at this moment is:  
v = v0 = 6.3 m/s  

the pen is mightier than sword
